initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT i_item_id,
       SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS total_return_quantity,
       SUM(cs_quantity) AS total_sold_quantity
FROM catalog_returns
JOIN catalog_sales ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = catalog_sales.cs_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON catalog_returns.cr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN item ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY i_item_id
ORDER BY total_return_quantity / NULLIF(total_sold_quantity, 0) DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS total_return_quantity,
    SUM(cs_quantity) AS total_sold_quantity
FROM 
    catalog_returns
JOIN 
    item ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON catalog_returns.cr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN 
    catalog_sales ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = catalog_sales.cs_item_sk 
                  AND catalog_returns.cr_returned_date_sk = catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id
ORDER BY 
    total_return_quantity / NULLIF(total_sold_quantity, 0) DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
  i_item_id,
  SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS total_return_quantity,
  SUM(cs_quantity) AS total_sold_quantity,
  SUM(cr_return_quantity) / NULLIF(SUM(cs_quantity), 0) AS return_rate
FROM catalog_returns
JOIN catalog_sales ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = catalog_sales.cs_item_sk
JOIN item ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON catalog_returns.cr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY i_item_id
ORDER BY return_rate DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  i_item_id,
  SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS total_return_quantity,
  SUM(cs_quantity) AS total_sold_quantity,
  SUM(cr_return_quantity) / NULLIF(SUM(cs_quantity), 0) AS return_rate
FROM
  catalog_returns
  JOIN catalog_sales ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = catalog_sales.cs_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON catalog_returns.cr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  JOIN item ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
WHERE
  date_dim.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY
  i_item_id
ORDER BY
  total_return_quantity / NULLIF(total_sold_quantity, 0) DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT i_item_id, 
       SUM(cr_return_quantity) AS total_return_quantity, 
       SUM(cs_quantity) AS total_sold_quantity
FROM catalog_returns
JOIN catalog_sales ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = catalog_sales.cs_item_sk
JOIN item ON catalog_returns.cr_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN date_dim ON catalog_returns.cr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2000
GROUP BY i_item_id
ORDER BY total_return_quantity / NULLIF(total_sold_quantity, 0) DESC
LIMIT 100
